name: GolfTRK - Liberty
address: 8321 N Booth Ave, Kansas City, MO 64158
about: GolfTRK - Liberty is a year-round indoor golf training facility equipped with advanced technology for practice and play. The venue features data-driven bays with TrackMan launch monitors and a PuttView indoor putting system, providing customized improvement plans for golfers of all skill levels. Members have access to the proprietary onboarding program leveraging Noonan technology, which provides data-driven club and aim recommendations on the course. The facility is operated by General Manager Jordan Bobert, a PGA Associate with over 5 years of golf operation experience, including roles as a Head Golf Professional.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven practice with world-class TrackMan technology and detailed performance analytics
Customized improvement plans built specifically for everyday golfers
Year-round access regardless of weather conditions
Family-oriented environment with a focus on building the next generation of golfers

food_and_drink.notes: Members are welcome to bring their own food; no on-site food service provided
Members are welcome to bring their own drinks; no on-site alcohol service provided

simulator_hardware.notes: World-leading ball flight and club data tracking
Augmented Reality system for putting practice with real-time ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the facility. The venue does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members are welcome to bring their own food and drinks. There is no on-site food or beverage service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the time it takes to play 18 holes. Members are advised to contact the facility directly for details.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GolfTRK Liberty is family-oriented and suitable for golfers of all skill levels, including juniors and youth.
